title: rosa sicula subsp. ligustica
intro: Rosa sicula subsp. ligustica, also known as the Ligurian rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa sicula rose plant, native to the Liguria region in Italy. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa sicula subsp. ligustica include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
